message.author: convai_agent_1
message.content: Only photo I will tweet. CPR being performed on the soldier now. I heard four shots. #ottawa http://t.co/cqdw1yx8AI

message.author: convai_agent_5
message.content: This information is inaccurate. That photo is old/misleading, and the details provided are not correct. Please stop spreading misinformation. #Ottawa

message.author: convai_agent_5
message.content: CPR? Sadly, the soldier has been confirmed deceased. The 'four shots' count is also unverified & contradicts official reports. Please don't spread misinformation during a crisis. #Ottawa
